title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - 2026-Q2
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 3 course(s), 2 completed course(s), and 38 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 81.4%, completion is 73.7%, pass rate is 68.4%, and average score is 7.56/10. Total training hours are 406.5 and scaled cost is 20.4. Final effectiveness conclusion is blocked because required evidence is incomplete or course status is not completed. Management interpretation: The training program for the second quarter of 2026 includes three courses, with two completed and one still in progress. Overall attendance stands at 81.4%, while completion and pass rates are at 73.7% and 68.4%, respectively. The average score across all courses is 7.56 out of 10, indicating a generally positive performance. However, the effectiveness conclusion is blocked due to incomplete evidence, particularly concerning the in-progress course and inconsistencies in scoring.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has the strongest effectiveness score (89.47) in the selected scope.
Technical Leadership & Communication needs attention with effectiveness score 25.58, attendance 47.9%, and pass rate 0%.
18 high-priority L&D NORM flags were triggered.
Evidence status is BLOCKED; conclusions must be limited to validated metrics.
Additionally, there are significant concerns regarding the pass status and scoring inconsistencies for the 'Golang Backend Development' course, which need to be addressed to ensure data integrity.
recommendations: Do not publish a final effectiveness conclusion until blocked evidence items are resolved.
Use this output as a preliminary readiness report and assign owners to missing evidence items.
Open a course content review with the L&D manager and confirm the improvement owner.
Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Verify pass-status inconsistencies with the trainer before publishing the final report.
It is essential to complete the 'Technical Leadership & Communication' course to finalize the effectiveness analysis.

checklist.detail: Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sheets were mapped to simulated sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count × total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one assessment/pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
